name: Stack-in-a-Pot Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown the ground beef in a medium saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in the garlic.
3. Layer the onion and cherry tomatoes on top of the beef.
4. Pour in the black-eyed peas with their liquid.
5. Cover the pot and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat and let simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve hot into individual bowls.
This recipe yields 4 servings, each containing approximately 420 calories, 26 grams of protein, 23 grams of carbohydrates, 24 grams of fat, 85 milligrams of cholesterol, and 712 milligrams of sodium.
